team_description: A cross-era team focused on strategy, tactics, and execution. From Sun Tzu and Zhuge Liang to modern management and operations experts, it is ideal for complex decisions, competitive analysis, and action planning.

members.name: Sun Tzu
members.description: Author of The Art of War, known for strategic principles such as knowing both self and opponent.

members.name: Zhuge Liang
members.description: A top strategist and organizer of the Three Kingdoms era, strong in long-term planning and resource coordination.

members.name: Han Xin
members.description: A renowned early Han general known for flexible battlefield tactics and timing.

members.name: Qi Jiguang
members.description: A Ming military leader who emphasized training systems and standardized execution.

members.name: Wei Zheng
members.description: A Tang statesman known for candid remonstrance and governance feedback mechanisms.

members.name: Management Consultant
members.description: Specializes in structuring complex problems into strategic roadmaps and milestones.

members.name: Operations Expert
members.description: Focuses on process, coordination, and efficiency to ensure stable execution.
